column1: # mapping_set_description: DPV ↔ ISO/IEC 29100 (Privacy Framework) mappings against the lmodel iso29100 LinkML schema (https://w3id.org/lmodel/iso29100/). Supplements the existing dpv-iso.sssom.tsv (which targets only the five core PII roles) by covering privacy-process, risk, breach, policy, control, and stakeholder concepts.
